sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80119" key="pauroeph/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παυρο-επής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n80119.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of few words,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.713</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
